_provenance: Schema-derived from feature-plans/m1f-real-shadow-equity-series.md AC-M1F.1.1 (migration 008) plus feature-plans/portfolio-analytics-integrity.md AC-3 (migration 015, adds position_epoch). Columns match the CREATE TABLE spec verbatim. No values computed by production code.
comment: BC-2: trigger_id is an advisory soft reference, NOT a FK. BC-6: idx_shadow_history_ts_utc required for prune DELETE. PA-M1F-10: NOT NULL columns have no DEFAULT. AC-M1F.6.5: math_mode added for V1 discrimination. Cluster-6 AC-3: position_epoch added by migration 015 — additive, NULLable, no DEFAULT; scopes each row to one position-open so the shadow-trajectory query can self-select the current epoch.
